summary: Iteration 19: Bug Fix Verification - All 4 reported bugs verified as fixed. 1) Documents page upload now accepts PDF, DOC/DOCX, TXT, CSV, XLS/XLSX files (was PDF only), 2) Import dialog auto-imports after upload completion, 3) Viewer tab changed from 'PDF-Ansicht' to 'Dokument-Ansicht', 4) DOCX content displays German umlauts correctly (ä, ö, ü, ß, Ä, Ö, Ü). All tests pass.

test_results.frontend: 100% (30/30 Playwright tests passed across bugfix-iteration19.spec.ts and multiformat-documents.spec.ts)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test document 'test_umlaute.docx' created by main agent to verify German umlaut fix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bugs from iteration 19 are verified as fixed. The multiformat-documents.spec.ts was updated to reflect the tab label change from 'PDF-Ansicht' to 'Dokument-Ansicht'. New bugfix-iteration19.spec.ts contains 10 targeted tests for the 4 bug fixes.

bug_1_multiformat_upload.description: Documents page upload now accepts PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, CSV, XLS, XLSX files

bug_2_import_auto_imports.description: Import dialog in editor auto-imports content after upload completion

bug_4_umlauts_display.description: DOCX content displays German umlauts correctly (ä, ö, ü, ß, Ä, Ö, Ü)
